title: Avatar sizes
code:
<gds-flex height="100%" width="100%" gap="xl" align-items="center" justify-content="center">
  <gds-avatar background="neutral-03" color="neutral-05"size="xs">XS</gds-avatar>
  <gds-avatar background="neutral-03" color="neutral-05" size="s">S</gds-avatar>
  <gds-avatar background="neutral-03" color="neutral-05" size="m">M</gds-avatar>
  <gds-avatar background="neutral-03" color="neutral-05" size="l">L</gds-avatar>
</gds-flex>
